title: Press Release | UN and Top Design Schools Unveil Next Chapter of Sustainable Tour Guide Uniforms
content:
UN and Top Design Schools Unveil Next Chapter of Sustainable Tour Guide Uniforms   New York, 28 April 2026 The United Nations, with academic and creative partners, today launched the next phase of the UN Tour Guide uniform initiative. The initiative brings together the UN Office for Partnerships and the UN Department of Global Communications [...]

title: A race for rights: How sport is helping protect girls in Uganda
content:
On a red running track in eastern Uganda, coach Zuena Cheptoek is doing more than training runners. For many girls in the Sebei subregion, she is also a confidante, a mentor and first line of protection against female genital mutilation, child marriage and abuse. Read Full Story on UN News

The post A race for rights: How sport is helping protect girls in Uganda appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Earth Day: The battle to save a drowning Pacific island nation
content:
As the Pacific island nation of Tuvalu battles rising sea levels that threaten to put large parts of the island entirely underwater by the end of this century, its citizens are making efforts to safeguard their future while preparing for the worst impacts of climate change.  Read Full Story on UN News

The post Earth Day: The battle to save a drowning Pacific island nation appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: SDG Media Zone Conversations at the 2026 ECOSOC Youth Forum
content:
More than a thousand young leaders, innovators, and advocates from around the world convened on 14-16 April at the 2026 UN ECOSOC Forum—the United Nations’ largest annual youth gathering in New York—to advance transformative solutions for the Sustainable Development Goals. Serving as a powerful platform for youth voices, the Forum concluded with renewed commitments to drive action [...]

title: Media Advisory | United Nations Permanent Forum on Indigenous Issues
content:
Media Advisory United Nations Permanent Forum on Indigenous Issues 25th Session: 20 April – 1 May 2026 The 25th Session of the United Nations Permanent Forum on Indigenous Issues (UNPFII25) – a two-week session with a high-level dialogue and thematic discussions. The session will cover the special theme “Ensuring Indigenous Peoples’ health, including in the [...]
